name: simpletoc
author: Marc Tönsing
description: SEO-friendly Table of Contents Gutenberg block. No JavaScript or CSS by default.

scripts.wait:wp-env: sh -c 'attempt=1; until wp-env run tests-cli wp db check; do if [ $attempt -ge 30 ]; then exit 1; fi; attempt=$((attempt + 1)); sleep 2; done'
scripts.test:e2e: wp-env start && npm run wait:wp-env && wp-env run tests-cli wp theme activate twentytwentythree && wp-scripts test-playwright
scripts.test:php: wp-env run --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/simpletoc tests-cli composer install && wp-env run --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/simpletoc tests-cli vendor/bin/phpunit
